    What are the most starred GitHub repositories?
    The following are some of the most starred repositories offering valuable learning materials for aspiring and professional developers. Repo Stats: freeCodeCamp is the most starred repository on GitHub. It is the backend for the main freeCodeCamp website that offers numerous free computer science learning materials.

  1. ✕
    This summary was generated using AI based on multiple online sources. To view the original source information, use the "Learn more" links.

    Most Popular GitHub Repositories

    12

    Trending repositories on GitHub today · GitHub

    https://github.com/trending

    Top 10 Most Popular GitHub Repos for Developers in 2025 - Geeksfor…

    https://www.geeksforgeeks.org/blogs/github-repos-for-developers/

    GitHub is a hub for developers to collaborate, share, and contribute to open-source projects. Some repositories stand out due to their utility, community engagement, and popularity. Below are some of the most notable repositories that developers frequently explore:

    1. FreeCodeCamp FreeCodeCamp is a non-profit organization offering a comprehensive open-source curriculum covering topics like HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. It has over 388k stars and provides real-world project opportunities, making it ideal for beginners and experienced developers alike.

    2. Free Programming Books This repository offers a curated collection of free resources, including books, courses, and tools, covering topics like programming languages, algorithms, and machine learning. With over 320k stars, it’s a go-to resource for self-learners.

    See more
